message:
feat(python): numpy.bartlett wrapper parity (franken_numpy-wgvh)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.bartlett(M) so the M-point
triangular window matches numpy. Test covers M=4 small window,
M=11 mid-peak ≈1.0 with center value verified, M=1 returning
[1.0], M=0 empty array, dtype float64 parity, symmetry around
center (via flip), and zero-valued endpoints.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
